hits.summary:
If a club does not have the results in HyTek Team Manager, they can export results in an SDIF format through the Club Rankings software obtained through the Rankings Department at Swim England.
If a club does not have the Club Rankings Software, contact the rankings department at SwimEngland at club.rankings@swimmingresults.org to request a copy.
A Club Name and Membership Number are required.
First, request a copy from helpdesk@swimmingresults.org or club.rankings@swimmingresults.org, which will provide a license key.
From here, clubs can download results files meet by meet.
hits.title: Getting Results From Swim England

hits.summary:
PLEASE NOTE:  The 6 fastest heats of all 50m and 100m events, the 5 fastest heats of all 200m events, 
and the 4 fastest 400m events with finals will be swum in the morning session.
Further heats of these 
same events will be swum in the afternoon sessions.
The finalists along with the completed results will 
therefore not be announced or posted until the final heat of each afternoon event has been swum.
Provisional finalists based on the morning heats only will be announced but this does not guarantee a 
place in the final.
...
its entirety slowest to fastest.
The fastest 16 athletes from the heats will advance to finals.

hits.summary:
PLEASE NOTE:  The 6 fastest heats of all 50m and 100m events, the 5 fastest heats of all 200m events, 
and the 4 fastest 400m events with finals will be swum in the morning session.
Further heats of these 
same events will be swum in the afternoon sessions.
The finalists along with the completed results will 
therefore not be announced or posted until the final heat of each afternoon event has been swum.
Provisional finalists based on the morning heats only will be announced but this does not guarantee a 
place in the final.
